$schema-note: Canonical old->new 301 redirect map for the Gatsby/Contentful -> Astro migration. Source of truth for F2/MEAT-34 (Firebase Hosting `redirects`). See redirect-plan.md for the verified config form and hand-off.
scope: Only the 5 renamed /posts/* slugs. setup-pivpn-wireguard-raspberry-pi was authored clean and needs no redirect. No other indexed paths existed (legacy had no sitemap).
notes: `from` is the decoded legacy path; `fromEncoded` is the browser/URL-encoded form (spaces as %20).
Destinations use the trailing-slash canonical form to match firebase.json `trailingSlash: true`.
dont-follow-your-dreams: the apostrophe appears either literally (') or percent-encoded (%27) in real links; the verified regex source in redirect-plan.md matches both.
Old paths must match with and without a trailing slash; matching is case-sensitive to the indexed casing shown.

redirects.from: /posts/Burn Your Self Help Books Before They Burn You
/posts/Friends Suck and Making them is Worse
